content: Production K8s operators (kubebuilder/Operator SDK) must use Conditions on status (not a single phase enum) and MUST set observedGeneration on every condition — GitOps tools gate rollout-complete on observedGeneration==metadata.generation; omitting it is the most common cause of stale-green pipelines. Finalizers convert delete into an update (deletionTimestamp set, object retained) so external cleanup can run before the finalizer is removed; finalizer logic must be robust/idempotent and always eventually remove itself, with an operational force-removal runbook as an escape hatch.
